title: Savory Roasted Jamaican Pork Roast
description: A savory and velvety Jamaican dish featuring a delicious pork roast, served with soft buns and a blend of Mediterranean-friendly spices, perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the allspice, thyme, garlic powder, and brown sugar.
Rub the spice mixture all over the pork roast, making sure to coat it evenly.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork roast until it is browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Add the soy sauce to the Dutch oven and bring to a boil.
Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Roast the pork for 20 minutes per pound, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the pork rest for 10 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Serve the pork on the soft buns with chopped scallions and your choice of toppings.
